excerptZh: 这期只保留近 24 小时里最值得继续跟进的 6 条 AI 更新，主线集中在 前沿研究与能力边界、Agent 与开发者工具。其中 2 条补抓了原文正文，所以解释不只停留在 RSS 片段。
excerptEn: This issue keeps only the 6 highest-signal AI updates from the last 24 hours, concentrated around Frontier research and capability shifts, Agents and developer tooling. 2 of them include fetched full article bodies, so the commentary goes beyond RSS snippets.

issueSummaryEn: This issue keeps only the 6 highest-signal AI updates from the last 24 hours, concentrated around Frontier research and capability shifts, Agents and developer tooling. 2 of them include fetched full article bodies, so the commentary goes beyond RSS snippets.
heroTitleEn: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia

featuredItems.titleEn: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
featuredItems.summaryZh: Google公布了一项围绕数据集的研究型更新，目标是推动能力边界继续外扩。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：Supported by a $1 million AUD investment from Google Australia’s Digital Future Initiative (DFI)… 为什么值得看：研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
featuredItems.summaryEn: Google published a research-driven update around dataset, aimed at pushing the capability frontier outward. The strongest signal in the article is: Supported by a $1 million AUD investment from Google Australia’s Digital Future Initiative (DFI), this collaboration uses Google for Health’s Population Health AI (PHAI). Why it matters…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: Research-heavy updates do not always become products immediately, but they often reveal where the next capability boundary is moving.

featuredItems.titleZh: Hugging Face开源上下文窗口、开源
featuredItems.titleEn: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached \#1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II
featuredItems.summaryZh: Hugging Face开源了围绕上下文窗口、开源的工作，让外部生态可以更直接地复用、检查和二次构建。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：- Then we generated ~80k trajectories 用于 the full 工作流 using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model. 为什么值得看：行业竞争点正在从“聊天回答得好不好”转向“能不能稳定接进软件、工具链和自动化流程”…
featuredItems.summaryEn: Hugging Face turned work around context window and open source into something the wider ecosystem can inspect, adapt, and build on. The strongest signal in the article is: - Then we generated ~80k trajectories for the full workflow using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model. Why it matters…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 行业竞争点正在从“聊天回答得好不好”转向“能不能稳定接进软件、工具链和自动化流程”，这决定了真正的生产力入口。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: The competitive focus is shifting from chat quality to whether models can plug into software, tooling, and automation flows reliably; that is where durable productivity entry points emerge.

featuredItems.titleEn: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
featuredItems.summaryZh: OpenAI把研究前沿进一步推进到产品和开发者工作流里，重点放在推动能力边界继续外扩。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents 并带来 files, tools, and state…
featuredItems.summaryEn: OpenAI pushed research frontier deeper into product and developer workflows, with a clear emphasis on pushing the capability frontier outward. The strongest signal in the article is: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state. Why it matters…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 研究型更新不一定会马上产品化，但它能提示下一阶段能力边界正在往哪边移动。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: Research-heavy updates do not always become products immediately, but they often reveal where the next capability boundary is moving.

issueSummaryEn: This issue keeps only the 6 highest-signal AI updates from the last 24 hours, concentrated around AI product experience, Retrieval, multimodal, and memory systems, Model safety and controllability. 2 of them include fetched full article bodies, so the commentary goes beyond RSS snippets.
heroTitleZh: OpenAI公布指令层级、提示注入
heroTitleEn: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs

themes.themeZh: 检索、多模态与记忆系统

featuredItems.titleZh: OpenAI公布指令层级、提示注入
featuredItems.titleEn: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
featuredItems.summaryZh: OpenAI公布了一项围绕指令层级、提示注入的研究型更新，目标是让模型在复杂提示冲突里更可控。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving 指令层级, 安全 steerability, and resistance to 提示注入 attacks…
featuredItems.summaryEn: OpenAI published a research-driven update around instruction hierarchy and prompt injection, aimed at making models more controllable under conflicting instructions. The strongest signal in the article is: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 这类进展会直接影响模型在真实产品里能否稳定遵循高优先级指令，是企业接入、Agent 可控性和高风险场景落地的基础。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: This kind of progress changes whether frontier models can obey higher-priority instructions reliably in production, which directly affects enterprise adoption, controllable agents, and high-risk deployments.

featuredItems.titleZh: OpenAI发布交互式可视化讲解、数学与科学
featuredItems.titleEn: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
featuredItems.summaryZh: OpenAI发布了一个围绕交互式可视化讲解、数学与科学的新动作，继续沿着“把 AI 能力做成可重复使用的产品体验”这条线推进。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：ChatGPT 发布 交互式可视化讲解 用于 数学与科学, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time. 为什么值得看：当能力真正进入用户日常动作时…
featuredItems.summaryEn: OpenAI rolled out a new move around interactive visual explanations and math and science, extending its push on turning capability into repeatable product behavior. The strongest signal in the article is: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 当能力真正进入用户日常动作时，竞争会从模型分数转向使用深度、留存、交互设计和默认入口。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: Once capability lands inside everyday user actions, competition shifts from raw model scores to depth of use, retention, interaction design, and default entry points.

featuredItems.titleZh: Hugging Face推进嵌入模型、多模态
featuredItems.titleEn: How NVIDIA Builds Open Data for AI
featuredItems.summaryZh: Hugging Face把嵌入模型、多模态进一步推进到产品和开发者工作流里，重点放在提升非结构化信息进入同一检索空间的能力。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：Enterprise + Article Published March 10, 2026 - A collaborative approach to scaling trustworthy AI systems and agents…
featuredItems.summaryEn: Hugging Face pushed embedding model and multimodal deeper into product and developer workflows, with a clear emphasis on bringing more unstructured data into the same retrieval space. The strongest signal in the article is: Enterprise + Article Published March 10, 2026 - A collaborative approach to scaling trustworthy AI systems and agents. Why it matters…
featuredItems.whyItMattersZh: 这类底层能力决定搜索、推荐、知识库和多模态检索系统的可用性，很多 AI 产品体验的上限取决于这里。
featuredItems.whyItMattersEn: These lower-layer capabilities determine the quality ceiling for search, recommendations, knowledge systems, and multimodal retrieval—many AI products become meaningfully better or worse here.
